title: Usage-Decline Save Play
body: When an account shows declining adoption near renewal, run a re-onboarding session, re-engage the executive sponsor, and schedule a value review focused on ROI. Escalate to the CS lead if the account is high ARR.

title: Executive Value Review Playbook
body: For stakeholders doubting ROI or cost justification, prepare a value summary (outcomes delivered, time saved, adoption) and host an executive value review with the economic buyer before renewal.

title: Seat Expansion Playbook
body: When a team reaches high seat utilisation (near the licensed limit) or requests more access, proactively propose a seat expansion or higher tier. Offer volume pricing to champions planning to add sub-teams.

title: Executive Business Review Cadence
body: Hold an Executive Business Review at least every quarter for strategic accounts to align on goals, demonstrate value, and surface expansion opportunities.

title: Best Practice: Early Churn Signals
body: Leading churn indicators include declining active users, support ticket spikes, sponsor turnover, and negative ROI sentiment. Act within three days of detection.

title: Product Docs: Capabilities & Limits
body: The platform supports SSO, role-based access, an analytics dashboard, and a public API with webhooks. Known limits: no offline mode; bulk export capped at 50k rows; SAML requires the Enterprise tier.

title: Product Docs: Integrations
body: Native integrations include Salesforce, HubSpot, Slack, and Zapier. The REST API enables custom integrations; rate limits are 600 requests/minute on Pro and 6000 on Enterprise.
